title: Fix inspect --format '{{.Mounts}}.
body: Go templating is incapable of dealing with pointers, so when we moved to Docker compatible mounts JSON, we broke it. The solution is to not use pointers in this part of inspect.

Added support for `.Src` and `.Dst` aliases. Added test.
